title: Radiant Egyptian Red Onions Pie
description: A smoky, flaky pie brimming with sweet caramelized red onions and aromatic spices, perfect for a festive Egyptian meal.
instructions: In a large saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat and sauté onions until caramelized, about 15 minutes.
Stir in cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper, and cook for 2 more minutes.
Remove from heat and let the mixture cool slightly.
In a bowl, combine flour and butter; rub with fingertips until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Add the beaten egg to the dough and mix until it comes together; form a disc, wrap in plastic, and chill for 30 minutes.
Roll the chilled dough on a floured surface into a circle that fits a 23cm pie dish, transfer, and press into the dish.
Spoon the onion filling into the crust and bake for 25 minutes until golden, then let cool before serving.
